data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a fallback channel policy when the preferred channel is blocked. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that demonstrate this requirement has been met. The linked use case mentions the need for a fallback policy, but there is no concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of fallback channel policy validation when the preferred channel is blocked.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for fallback channel policy
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system correctly implements fallback channel logic when the preferred channel is blocked.
